scripts.check: bun run check:types && bun run check:lint && bun run test && bun run pack:core && bun run pack:timestamps && bun run pack:soft-delete
scripts.check:lint: bunx @biomejs/biome check packages/core packages/timestamps packages/soft-delete benchmark .github
scripts.bench:all: bun run benchmark/time.ts && bun run benchmark/memory.ts
scripts.pack:core: bun run build:core && cd packages/core && npm pack --dry-run
scripts.pack:timestamps: bun run build:timestamps && cd packages/timestamps && npm pack --dry-run
scripts.pack:soft-delete: bun run build:soft-delete && cd packages/soft-delete && npm pack --dry-run
